top_signals.title: Ukraine's Zelenskyy ousts defense minister in surprise shake-up as protest calls emerge
top_signals.summary: The move sparked some to call for a peaceful protest and comes shortly after Ukraine's parliament accepted the resignation of Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
